name: Orange Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Build up layers in a medium, buttered casserole dish:
- Place sweet potatoes, sprinkled with brown sugar.
- Dot with butter.
- Add orange slices.
- Repeat until all ingredients are used.
2. Heat honey (enough to make it liquid) and mix with orange juice.
3. Pour the mixture over the casserole layers.
4. Combine crumbs with remaining butter and sugar, then spread over top.
5. Cover and bake for 30-40 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until done after 25 minutes. Remove cover during last 15 minutes of baking.
